first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are functionally identical. The scores are the same, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively unchanged. Minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's skills relative to the job requirements. The location change had no discernible impact.
